name: Chestnut-Mushroom Casserole
recipeInstructions:
1. Make a white sauce using butter, flour, and cream.
2. Add salt, pepper, granulated bouillon dissolved in hot water to the sauce.
3. Incorporate mushroom soup into the sauce.
4. Sauté mushrooms in a little butter and combine with chestnuts.
5. Transfer mixture to a buttered casserole dish and top with cheese.
6. Bake at 350 degrees Fahrenheit for 20-30 minutes until cheese is melted and dish is bubbly.
7. Serve hot.
(For a single serving, prepare two casseroles and freeze one after cooking. Thaw completely before reheating.)
